### compose-args: -f compose.yaml
### file: .env
# Generated by `songstress install` вЂ” secrets live HERE and only here
# (mode 0600). songstress.lock.json carries no secrets.

# в”Ђв”Ђ basics в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
TZ=UTC
PUID=1000
PGID=1000
MUSIC_DIR=/srv/music
SONGSTRESS_PORT=8090
ENABLE_TELEMETRY=true

# в”Ђв”Ђ app admin (sign-in for web, desktop & mobile) в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_EMAIL=a@b.c
SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_PASSWORD=sct.admin.7f3k

# в”Ђв”Ђ public URL (set this if you front Songstress with a proxy/tunnel) в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
# The origin you serve Songstress on, e.g. https://music.example.com. Makes
# invite & password-reset email links resolve; blank is fine on a LAN.
SONGSTRESS_PUBLIC_URL=

# в”Ђв”Ђ Navidrome (managed sibling service) в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
NAVIDROME_PORT=4533
NAVIDROME_PASSWORD=sct.nd.7f3k

### file: compose.yaml
# Generated by `songstress install` вЂ” regenerate with `songstress reconfigure`.
# Songstress (datastore, dashboard, acquisition worker) + official Navidrome.
services:
  songstress:
    image: ghcr.io/pacholoamit/songstress:v0.21.0
    container_name: songstress
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_EMAIL=${SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_EMAIL}
      - SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_PASSWORD=${SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_PASSWORD}
      # Public URL вЂ” the origin your reverse proxy / tunnel serves this on. Sets
      # the app URL baked into invite & password-reset email links (otherwise
      # they point at http://localhost:8090). Empty is fine on a LAN.
      - SONGSTRESS_PUBLIC_URL=${SONGSTRESS_PUBLIC_URL:-}
      - ENABLE_TELEMETRY=${ENABLE_TELEMETRY}
      - APP_VERSION=0.21.0
      - MUSIC_LIBRARIES=Main=/music
      # Managed Navidrome: Songstress provisions + drives the service below;
      # the player streams straight from it on ${NAVIDROME_PORT}.
      - SONGSTRESS_MANAGED_NAVIDROME=1
      - SONGSTRESS_NAVIDROME_PORT=${NAVIDROME_PORT}
      - NAVIDROME_URL=http://navidrome:4533
      - NAVIDROME_USERNAME=admin
      - NAVIDROME_PASSWORD=${NAVIDROME_PASSWORD}
      # Email (optional; empty host/to = disabled). Set via `.env` вЂ” the install
      # wizard's SMTP group writes them; these defaults cover the unset case.
      - SMTP_HOST=${SMTP_HOST:-}
      - SMTP_PORT=${SMTP_PORT:-587}
      - SMTP_USERNAME=${SMTP_USERNAME:-}
      - SMTP_PASSWORD=${SMTP_PASSWORD:-}
      - SMTP_FROM=${SMTP_FROM:-}
      - SMTP_TO=${SMTP_TO:-}
      - SMTP_STARTTLS=${SMTP_STARTTLS:-true}
    ports:
      # Published on the host вЂ” front this with your own reverse proxy, tunnel,
      # or tailnet. Songstress terminates no TLS of its own.
      - "${SONGSTRESS_PORT}:8090"
    volumes:
      - ./data:/pb/pb_data
      - ${MUSIC_DIR}:/music
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:mode=1777
    depends_on:
      navidrome:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped

  navidrome:
    image: deluan/navidrome:0.62.0
    container_name: songstress-navidrome
    user: "${PUID}:${PGID}"
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - ND_MUSICFOLDER=/music
      - ND_DATAFOLDER=/data
      - ND_PORT=4533
      # Songstress triggers scans after acquisitions вЂ” no double-scanning.
      - ND_SCANNER_SCHEDULE=0
      - ND_SCANNER_WATCHERWAIT=0
      - ND_SCANNER_SCANONSTARTUP=true
      - ND_ENABLETRANSCODINGCONFIG=true
      # Creates the 'admin' user on Navidrome's FIRST boot only.
      - ND_DEVAUTOCREATEADMINPASSWORD=${NAVIDROME_PASSWORD}
    ports:
      # Published so the browser can stream/seek directly.
      - "${NAVIDROME_PORT}:4533"
    volumes:
      # ND data nested under the datastore root вЂ” one directory to back up.
      - ./data/navidrome:/data
      - ${MUSIC_DIR}:/music:ro
    healthcheck:
      # The official image ships no HEALTHCHECK; songstress gates on this.
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "-qO-", "http://127.0.0.1:4533/ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 30s
    restart: unless-stopped
